entry.title: Forking Seals
entry.summary: The quick fix on the left fork seal did not work. Not long after leaving the shop you could see fork oil slowly accumulating on top of the seal and on the fork itself. I called Endras back and they booked my in for Friday the 28th. Hopefully last minute …
entry.content:
The quick fix on the left fork seal did not work. Not long after leaving the shop you could see fork oil slowly accumulating on top of the seal and on the fork itself. I called Endras back and they booked my in for Friday the 28th. Hopefully last minute maintenance before a big Summer motorcycle trip doesn’t become a habit.

Minor panic when I got the bike in. The tech who was scheduled to do the work was off sick. Now, I must say Endras got me fixed up. They understood the urgency and got one of their other service techs to squeeze it into their schedule. On the other hand, a call to let me know my tech was off sick would have been appreciated!

Still, all’s well that ends well. The work was covered under warranty and I was all set for my Newfoundland trip. I also picked up the BMW Small Tankrucksack while I was there.
